rulings.Case Title: MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL VS BLOOMINGDALE'S
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Not Of Mot And Mot To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment;Mp&As;Decl Of William Verick In Support
rulings.Rulings: APPROVED PROVIDED FOLLOWING CHANGES ARE MADE: (1)JUDGMENT TO EXPRESSLY PROVIDE MONETARY RELIEF NOT RESTITUTION BUT PAYMENT IN LIEU OF CIVIL PENALTY AND TO FURTHER PROVIDE DEFENDANTS TO NOT TO GET CREDIT AGAINST FUTURE CLAIM FOR PAYMENT. INFORMATION PROVIDED AS TO CALIFORNIAN FOR ALTERNATIVES TO TOXICS SUFFICIENT TO MEET PROPOSED REGULATION 3203 RECIPIENTS INFORMATION AS TO OTHER RECIPIENTS INADEQUATE AND WILL NOT BE APPROVED UNLESS FURTHER INFORMATION PROVIDED. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: HART VS UCSF STANFORD HEALTHCARE
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE DISCRIMINATION, RETALIATION OR INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. DENY CCP 437C(H) CONTINUANCE REQUEST. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: AS YOU SOW VS ADG CONCERNS INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Deft Tai Sang; P&A; Declaration Of Andrew L Packard; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: APPROVE PROVIDED FOLLOWING CHANGES ARE MADE IN REQUESTED JUDGMENT (1)CHARACTERIZATION OF RESTITUTION TO BE CHANGED TO PAYMENT IN LIEU OF CIVIL PENALTY. IN ADDITION JUDGMENT TO EXPRESSLY PROVIDE THAT PENALTY IS NOT TO BE CREDIT AGAINST ANY FUTURE CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT. (2)LIST OF RECIPIENT OF RESTITUTION PAYMENT NOT SATISFACTORY. PAYMENTS TO BE MADE TO SPECIFIC ORGANIZATIONS IN CONFORMITY WITH ATTORNEY GENERAL'S PROPOSED REGULATION 3203 WITH APPROPRIATE SUPPORTING PROOF AND APPROVAL OF ATTORNEY GENERAL. OBJECTIONABLE LANGUAGE AS TO OTHER PARTIES STRIKEN. (PB)
